headline: Uber (UBER) Stock Could Be 12.4% Undervalued After Its New Advertising Push
summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) is back in focus after unveiling three new advertising products that aim to use its ride, delivery, and shopping data to connect brands with consumers across and beyond its own apps. See our latest analysis for Uber Technologies. The advertising update comes as Uber Technologies’ share price return has risen 5.8% over the last day and 4% over the past week, while the 90 day share price return is down 6.4% and the 1 year total shareholder return is down 14.4%. This...

headline: Goldman-Backed Go Rises 10% After Biggest Japan IPO This Year
